tasks.title: feat(brain): harness/health 端点 — Walking Skeleton 验证
tasks.scope: 在 packages/brain/src/routes/harness.js 新增 GET /api/brain/harness/health handler，返回 JSON { langgraph_version, last_attempt_at, nodes }；langgraph_version 读 @langchain/langgraph 的 package.json version 字段，last_attempt_at 取 SELECT MAX(updated_at) FROM initiative_runs WHERE phase IN ('done','failed','B_task_loop','C_final_e2e')，nodes 列出 14 个 LangGraph 节点名。在 packages/brain/src/server.js 注册该 router（若未挂）。新增 tests/integration/harness-health.test.ts 起 staging Brain 后 curl /api/brain/harness/health 校验状态码 200 + body 字段齐全。
dod: packages/brain/src/routes/harness.js 含 GET /api/brain/harness/health handler，返回 JSON 含 langgraph_version (string) + last_attempt_at (ISO8601 string 或 null) + nodes (14 元素 string array)
tests/integration/harness-health.test.ts 启 staging Brain 后 curl 该端点：HTTP 200，body.langgraph_version 非空，body.nodes.length === 14
执行 npx vitest run tests/integration/harness-health.test.ts 退出码为 0
执行 curl -fsS http://localhost:5222/api/brain/harness/health | jq -e '.langgraph_version and (.nodes|length==14)' 退出码为 0

scenarios.name: health 端点在 staging Brain 上返回 200 且字段齐全
本 Initiative 在 task_events 中至少记录 14 个 distinct nodeName 的 graph_node_update

commands.cmd: psql -h localhost -p 55432 -U cecelia -d cecelia -At -c "SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT payload->>'nodeName') FROM task_events WHERE event_type='graph_node_update' AND payload->>'initiativeId'='w8-langgraph-acceptance-20260507'" | awk '{ if ($1+0 >= 14) exit 0; else { print "only " $1 " distinct nodes"; exit 1 } }'

scenarios.name: initiative_runs 行 phase 已推进到 C_final_e2e 或 done 且 contract approved

commands.cmd: psql -h localhost -p 55432 -U cecelia -d cecelia -At -c "SELECT ir.phase FROM initiative_runs ir JOIN initiative_contracts ic ON ic.id=ir.contract_id WHERE ir.initiative_id='w8-langgraph-acceptance-20260507' AND ic.status='approved' ORDER BY ir.started_at DESC LIMIT 1" | grep -E '^(C_final_e2e|done)$'

scenarios.name: T1 PR 已合并到 main（Walking Skeleton 真实交付证据）

commands.cmd: test -f packages/brain/src/routes/harness.js && grep -q '/api/brain/harness/health' packages/brain/src/routes/harness.js && test -f tests/integration/harness-health.test.ts
